_source: TH_EXPLORE_IT_DATA.json (authoritative structured data). Real accessions, per-item licence + open_access flag. Nothing authored by an assistant.

station.tagline: He doesn't do loyalty. He does microseconds. Whoever blinks last loses everything.

museum_objects.title: Solana Whitepaper (Proof of History)
museum_objects.description: The original technical whitepaper by Anatoly Yakovenko introducing 'Proof of History,' the innovation behind Solana's speed.
museum_objects.significance: This document is Niko's entire personality laid out in advance: obsessed with speed, engineered to never waste a microsecond.
museum_objects.plain_language: The original technical document that first described how Solana would work, written years before it actually launched.

resolved.via: long tail — needs a per-domain licence rule

museum_objects.rights_note: NO OPEN IMAGE FOUND — panel must show text/citation only.

museum_objects.title: Solana GitHub Source Code Repository
museum_objects.description: The open-source codebase for the Solana blockchain protocol, licensed under Apache 2.0.
museum_objects.significance: Every rule Niko follows is written in code anyone can read — there's no hidden agenda, just cold, published logic running exactly as designed.
museum_objects.plain_language: The actual public computer code that runs Solana, free for anyone in the world to read or check.

resolved.via: long tail — needs a per-domain licence rule

museum_objects.rights_note: NO OPEN IMAGE FOUND — panel must show text/citation only.

museum_objects.title: Solana Mainnet Beta Launch Records
museum_objects.description: Official records and announcements marking the launch of Solana's mainnet beta.
museum_objects.significance: This is the exact day Niko went live — and within two years he'd be worth $260, then crash below $10. Speed cuts both ways.
museum_objects.plain_language: Official records of the day in 2020 when Solana's network actually went live for real use.

resolved.via: long tail — needs a per-domain licence rule

museum_objects.rights_note: NO OPEN IMAGE FOUND — panel must show text/citation only.

museum_objects.title: FTX/Alameda SOL Holdings Analysis
museum_objects.description: Financial analysis documenting FTX and Alameda Research's massive holdings of roughly 58 million SOL tokens before the exchange's collapse.
museum_objects.significance: Niko's near-death experience — tied so closely to one company's fate that when FTX collapsed, he nearly went down with it.
museum_objects.plain_language: A financial analysis explaining how a huge crypto exchange's collapse in 2022 nearly took Solana's value down with it.

resolved.via: long tail — needs a per-domain licence rule

museum_objects.rights_note: NO OPEN IMAGE FOUND — panel must show text/citation only.

museum_objects.title: Solana Breakpoint Conference Records
museum_objects.description: Archival records from Solana's flagship annual developer and community conference, held in cities including Lisbon.
museum_objects.significance: Niko doesn't have a hometown the way old currencies do — his community gathers wherever the conference lands that year.
museum_objects.plain_language: Records from Solana's big annual conference, which travels to a different city around the world each year.

resolved.via: long tail — needs a per-domain licence rule

museum_objects.rights_note: NO OPEN IMAGE FOUND — panel must show text/citation only.

world_map.map_description: Niko was engineered in Silicon Valley, launched into a decentralized global network, and nearly destroyed by a single exchange's collapse before recovering.

nodes.label: San Francisco (Solana Labs)
nodes.description: Home base of Solana Labs, where the core protocol was developed.

nodes.label: Global Validator Network
nodes.description: Solana runs on a decentralized network of validators spread across the globe, with no single physical headquarters for the network itself.

nodes.label: Lisbon, Portugal (Breakpoint 2021)
nodes.description: Host city for one of Solana's major annual developer conferences.

nodes.label: Nassau, Bahamas (FTX HQ)
nodes.description: Former headquarters of FTX, whose collapse in 2022 severely impacted Solana's price and reputation.
